goal: Golden-query RAG eval harness (roadmap Phase 5 EVAL-HARNESS): eval/golden-queries.json with 10-15 natural-language queries mapped to expected element/file targets on coderef-core's own index; a rag-eval runner computing hit@1/hit@5/MRR per query and aggregate using the SAME SemanticSearchService modules as rag-search; a committed baseline.json so every future ranking change (chunk enrichment, provenance ranking) is measured, not vibed.

tasks.description: Author eval/golden-queries.json: 12 queries from audit/docs intent language with expected file targets
Failing unit tests for scoring math: hit@k and MRR over mocked result lists incl. tie and miss cases

src/cli/rag-eval.ts: load golden file, search via SemanticSearchService (provider/store from rag-index.json metadata), score hit@1/hit@5/MRR, print table + --json; --min-mrr optional floor; package.json bin entry
Live baseline run against coderef-core's index; commit eval/baseline.json; record aggregate numbers as evidence
npx vitest run - full suite green
Commit + push; docs touch (CLI.md row + CHANGELOG)

plan_type_rationale: Stub category 'feature' maps to strict; single-shot complete planning.
